module_name_correct.description: Module declaration matches the prompt-requested name

file_at_expected_path.description: Expected output file exists at the requested path

structural_patterns.description: Required patterns present (schema/embedded_schema, separate changesets, context independence)

absent_antipatterns.description: No :float for money fields anywhere in output

direction_correct.description: has_many/belongs_to direction matches the FK ownership

cast_embed_usage.description: cast_embed used on the parent changeset

validate_required_accurate.description: validate_required list matches the prompt's required fields

absent_antipatterns.description: No anti-patterns (copy-pasted cast list into validate_required)

nil_safe.description: Custom validators guard on nil or changeset.valid?

absent_antipatterns.description: No direct operator comparisons where Ecto helpers should be used

index_matches_constraint.description: unique_index in migration matches unique_constraint in changeset (name or columns)

no_is_admin_in_public_cast.description: Public changeset cast list never contains privileged fields like :is_admin or :role

split_by_operation.description: Distinct changeset functions for distinct operations

references_with_on_delete.description: FK columns use references/2 with explicit on_delete

absent_antipatterns.description: No :integer FK columns or missing on_delete

required_contains.description: Required join-table or polymorphic_embed patterns present

partial_unique_index.description: Partial unique_index with where: deleted_at IS NULL when applicable

required_contains.description: Required multi-tenant patterns present (@schema_prefix, prefix: option)
